#Week2

\# WEEK 2: Landsat 8 Sensor\
\
\## Summary\
This week focused on understanding the Landsat 8 sensor and its role in remote sensing.\
\
\## Application\
Landsat 8 data can be used for land cover mapping, vegetation monitoring, and environmental change detection.\
\
\## Reflection\
This week helped me understand how remote sensing sensors collect and provide data for analysis.
